notes: Keeps the Clipboard monitoring switch visually stable on hover while preserving its click cursor and state-aware guidance.
Removes the repeated Library heading so the selected navigation and content hierarchy stay concise.
Aligns the website resource enable and pause controls with the desktop application's status icons and disabled treatment.
Makes resource status controls interactive in the website product model for a more faithful demonstration.
Publishes separate Apple Silicon and Intel macOS packages; Intel macOS and Windows packages remain marked beta.
